citations.description: File contains only test_explicit_caused_by_on_bug_close (explicit --caused-by flag test), no single-culprit auto-derivation test.
The actual single-culprit auto-derivation test (test_blame_autoderives_single_culprit) is in the _heldout companion file, not in the file named by AC1.

findings.criterion: `tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_caused_by_autoderive.py` passes: closing a bug (`--class regression`) over a single-culprit fixture yields a `caused_by` link to the resolved ticket — proving the direct-writer path defeats the closed-source guard.
findings.detail: The named file `tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_caused_by_autoderive.py` exists and passes, but it contains only `test_explicit_caused_by_on_bug_close`, which tests the explicit `--caused-by` flag path (AC3's scenario), NOT the single-culprit blame auto-derivation that the criterion describes. The single-culprit auto-derivation test (`test_blame_autoderives_single_culprit`) is in `test_caused_by_autoderive_heldout.py` instead. The criterion specifically states the named file must prove single-culprit blame auto-derivation without an explicit `--caused-by` flag, and that content is not in `test_caused_by_autoderive.py`.
findings.remediation: Move or duplicate `test_blame_autoderives_single_culprit` into `tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_caused_by_autoderive.py` so the AC-named file demonstrates that closing a bug over a single-culprit git fixture auto-draws a `caused_by` link with no explicit `--caused-by` flag.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
